channel.title: Austin's Portfolio — Blog
channel.description: Research across inference, deception, and volatility.

item.title: Three Percent, Honestly: Optimizing LLM Decode on an RX 6700 XT
item.description: The important result is not a record claim. It is extracting a repeatable hot-loop improvement from accessible consumer hardware while treating correctness, thermals, failed experiments, and provenance as first-class results.
